title: Survey of Hallucination Detection in Large Language Models
abstract: This survey reviews hallucination detection, factuality evaluation, faithfulness metrics, benchmarks, and mitigation methods for large language models.

title: Factuality Evaluation for Neural Text Generation
abstract: The paper proposes factuality evaluation methods for neural text generation including claim verification, entailment scoring, and faithfulness analysis.

title: Retrieval Grounded Hallucination Mitigation for Large Language Models
abstract: This work combines retrieval augmented generation with evidence grounding to reduce hallucination in large language model answers.

title: Graph Neural Networks for Software Vulnerability Detection
abstract: The paper models source code as program graphs and applies graph neural networks for software vulnerability detection on code vulnerability datasets.

title: Code Representation Learning for Vulnerability Detection
abstract: A code representation learning approach for vulnerability detection using token sequences, control flow, data flow, and graph based program features.

title: Evaluating Retrieval Augmented Generation with Evidence Attribution
abstract: The paper evaluates retrieval augmented generation systems using evidence attribution, answer faithfulness, grounding precision, and reranking quality.

title: Dense Passage Retrieval with Sentence Embeddings
abstract: Dense passage retrieval represents queries and passages with sentence embeddings and improves semantic similarity search for question answering.
